title: Morning Market Brief — April 20, 2026
excerpt: TSLA reclaims $400 ahead of earnings, semis stay bid, crypto firms modestly, and prediction markets still lean toward some Fed easing in 2026.

title: What Would Desmond Buy — Day 65: Back in the Green
excerpt: Portfolio crosses back into positive territory at +0.82% after nine days without an update. All positions green except DDOG (-0.6%). CRWD and NVDA leading the charge as the market rips through an 11-day rally streak. Still 63% cash heading into TSLA earnings week.

title: Morning Market Brief — April 14, 2026
excerpt: Quiet pre-market Tuesday: equities flat after Monday's Iran-fear whipsaw. Crypto rips — ETH +8.3%, BTC +4.6%, SOL +4.1%. PPI data today is the main event. Polymarket heavy on Iran resolution bets. USDA adopts Grok. Tesla FSD in Netherlands. Karpathy's AI capability gap thread still reverberating. SpaceX $2T IPO chatter heats up.

title: Morning Market Brief — April 13, 2026
excerpt: Monday open dominated by Iran strike fears — oil surges +8%, futures well off lows but volatile. Tesla FSD launches in Netherlands. Karpathy drops viral thread on AI capability gap. NFLX earnings week. MU chart breaking out. Web data sources down — brief built from Twitter intel.

title: Evening Brief — Thursday, April 9, 2026
excerpt: Stocks close mixed with QQQ/SPY extending winning streaks (6 days straight). TXN +2.91% leads Adrian's watchlist. BTC at $72K, ETH $2.19K. Musk shows FSD driving LA. Karpathy on AI capability gaps. Fed officials on the speaking circuit tomorrow.
